Zucchini Rounds (pancakes)

author: Marirose Germick

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield: 9 pancakes

Background

This is Mom’s recipe

Ingredients

1/3 cup Bisquick 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese 1/8 tsp pepper 2 slightly beaten eggs 2 cups shredded zucchini

Directions

  1. Mix Bisquick, cheese, pepper. Add eggs & fold in zucchini.
  2. Fry in butter or bacon fat.
